Package noppes.npcs.api

Interface ICommand

  • public interface ICommand
    Represents a custom command that can be registered and executed.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void addAliases​(String... aliases)
      Adds one or more aliases for this command.
      String[] getAliases()
      Gets all aliases for this command.
      String getCommandName()
      Gets the name of this command.
      String getCommandUsage()
      Gets the usage string for this command.
      int getPermissionLevel()
      Gets the permission level required to execute this command.
      boolean hasAlias​(String alias)
      Checks whether this command has a specific alias.
      void removeAlias​(String alias)
      Removes an alias from this command.
      void setCommandName​(String commandName)
      Sets the name of this command.
      void setCommandUsage​(String commandUsage)
      Sets the usage string for this command.
      void setPermissionLevel​(int permissionLevel)
      Sets the permission level required to execute this command.

    • Method Detail

      • getCommandName

        String getCommandName()
        Gets the name of this command.
        Returns:
        the command name

      • getCommandUsage

        String getCommandUsage()
        Gets the usage string for this command.
        Returns:
        the command usage description

      • getPermissionLevel

        int getPermissionLevel()
        Gets the permission level required to execute this command.
        Returns:
        the permission level (0 = all, 1 = moderator, 2 = gamemaster, 3 = admin, 4 = owner)

      • setCommandName

        void setCommandName​(String commandName)
        Sets the name of this command.
        Parameters:
        commandName - the command name to set

      • setCommandUsage

        void setCommandUsage​(String commandUsage)
        Sets the usage string for this command.
        Parameters:
        commandUsage - the command usage description to set

      • setPermissionLevel

        void setPermissionLevel​(int permissionLevel)
        Sets the permission level required to execute this command.
        Parameters:
        permissionLevel - the permission level (0 = all, 1 = moderator, 2 = gamemaster, 3 = admin, 4 = owner)

      • getAliases

        String[] getAliases()
        Gets all aliases for this command.
        Returns:
        an array of alias strings

      • addAliases

        void addAliases​(String... aliases)
        Adds one or more aliases for this command.
        Parameters:
        aliases - the alias(es) to add

      • hasAlias

        boolean hasAlias​(String alias)
        Checks whether this command has a specific alias.
        Parameters:
        alias - the alias to check for
        Returns:
        true if the alias exists

      • removeAlias

        void removeAlias​(String alias)
        Removes an alias from this command.
        Parameters:
        alias - the alias to remove
